description_long: This object is a loaf of bread with a rustic, artisanal appearance, featuring a thick, golden-brown crust with subtle flour dusting and natural, uneven coloration. The loaf is cylindrical with slightly domed ends and a flat base, and one end has been sliced to reveal the soft, airy interior. The exposed crumb is pale beige with irregular air pockets, typical of a well-leavened bread. The crust displays a marbled pattern of light and darker brown tones, suggesting a hand-shaped, oven-baked process. The sliced piece lies flat beside the loaf, showing its thinness and the contrast between the crust and the soft inside. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or labels on the bread.
description: A rustic, cylindrical loaf of bread with a golden-brown, marbled crust and a sliced end revealing a soft, airy interior. The loaf has a natural, hand-shaped appearance with a single slice lying beside it.
description_view_0: The loaf is viewed from the rounded, unsliced end, highlighting the domed crust and marbled brown coloration.
description_view_1: The side view shows the cylindrical shape, the marbled crust, and the sliced end with the separate bread slice visible.
description_view_2: The view directly faces the sliced end, clearly displaying the pale, airy crumb and the full round slice lying flat in front.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, showing the loaf's length, crust pattern, and the separated slice positioned to the side.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, marbled pattern with light and dark brown tones and a light dusting of flour, giving it a hand-shaped, artisanal look without any scoring or seeds.
